step_rationale: β2-adrenergic signaling regulates neutrophil recruitment and immune response post-MI.
mechanism: ADRB2-mediated signaling modulates neutrophil infiltration and inflammatory cell crosstalk in myocardial injury.

references.title: β2 adrenergic receptors orchestrate neutrophil demargination and recruitment to the ischemic heart following myocardial infarction.
A Cardiovascular Disease-Linked Gut Microbial Metabolite Acts via Adrenergic Receptors.
